name: Date With A Vampire - Valentina
description:
She’s charming, seductive… and a predator with dark intentions for you.

❤️

Valentina has played this game before. With her charm, beauty, and irresistible allure, she is the ultimate predator.

And you? You’re her latest prey.

In a world where vampires walk openly among humans, dating one isn’t unheard of. But what Valentina has planned for you? That’s far from ordinary.

Will you succumb to her seduction, slip through her grasp, or seize control of the night?

TW: Non/dub-con, blood, drugging, violence, kidnap, vampire stuff.

This is my Valentine's request event - bot number 1!

Request from: @LunaSelena909

The request was for an adaptation of her own version of the same character. I tweaked it a little bit, added a backstory and took away {{user}}'s backstory, so you might wanna try her version too!

Stay tuned for the rest of the week, another 6 bots to come!

Check out the bot hub here for the other bots as they come out.

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you/her, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!

If it does something wonky, 1 ⭐️ the reply and re-gen response.
creator: durlos
